ctaBanner.title: Ready to discuss a container load?
ctaBanner.subtitle: Tell us your target specs, destination port, and timeline. We quote the same day in most time zones.

hero.title: Shisha charcoal briquettes for importers who run the numbers
hero.subtitleTemplate: {{moqTons}}-ton container loads from our {{port}} factory. Full export documentation, consistent burn specifications, and samples you can verify in the lab before you commit.
hero.descriptionTemplate: Coconut shell shisha charcoal briquettes from {{port}}, {{country}}. Factory-direct, MOQ {{moqLabel}}. Full export documentation and consistent burn specifications.

footer.logoTaglineTemplate: {{iso9001Short}} Certified Shisha Charcoal Manufacturer in Indonesia

description.p1Suffix: , is an Indonesian direct manufacturer and wholesale exporter of 100% natural coconut shell charcoal briquettes specifically engineered for shisha and hookah applications.
description.p2Template: Officially established in {{year}} (Company Registration NIB: {{nib}}, National Tax ID: {{taxId}}) with its primary manufacturing facility located at {{street}}, {{city}}, {{region}}, {{country}}, the company sustains a production capacity of {{capacity}} tons per day.
description.p3Template: Operating under the executive direction of {{executives}}.
description.p4Template: The factory is certified by {{isoStandard}} standards (audit by {{auditors}} laboratories). We ensure uncompromising compliance with global maritime logistics, strictly adhering to IMDG Code {{unNumber}} Class {{unClass}} {{imdgClassDescription}} safety protocols, independent Self-Heating Tests (SHT), and the provision of fully authenticated Preferential Certificates of Origin for international container shipping.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you were looking for doesn't exist, or it may have moved.

meta.descriptionTemplate: Contact our coconut shell charcoal briquette factory in {{city}}, {{country}}. WhatsApp, phone, email, WeChat, Telegram, video call. Sales team, factory address, bank details, holidays.

hero.title: Contact our coconut charcoal factory
hero.subtitle: Ready to order premium coconut shisha charcoal? Message us on WhatsApp for the fastest response, or use any channel below.
hero.ctaWhatsappAria: Open WhatsApp chat with the factory (opens in new tab)
hero.ctaEmailAria: Open a new email to the sales team
hero.microcopy: Typical WhatsApp response time: under 2 hours during business days (GMT+7).

whatsappPrimary.heading: Message the factory directly on WhatsApp
whatsappPrimary.lead: WhatsApp is our primary channel for international buyers. Message us 24/7; we respond within 2 hours during business days (Mon–Sat, 08:00–16:00 GMT+7).
whatsappPrimary.includeHeading: What to include in your first message
includeItems: Product type (cube, hexagonal, finger, dome, flat)
Target volume (kg per month, or containers per shipment)
Packaging preference (master box, inner box, white-label)
whatsappPrimary.voiceVideoNote: Prefer voice or video? We do WhatsApp voice and video calls by appointment — request a slot in your first message.

team.heading: Meet the sales team
team.lead: Our export desk is staffed by a small team that handles wholesale inquiries from quote to bill of lading. Each member speaks at least English plus one other language relevant to our buyer markets.

channels.heading: All contact channels
channels.lead: Reach us on whichever channel is most convenient. We monitor every channel during business hours; outside business hours, WhatsApp messages are checked first.
channels.videoMeetingLabel: By appointment via Zoom or Google Meet

form.heading: Send a wholesale inquiry
form.lead: Fill out this form for a written quote, MOQ details, and a Proforma Invoice. We reply within one business day. For faster response, message us on WhatsApp.
form.sidebarLead: WhatsApp typically responds in under 2 hours during business days. Use the inquiry form when you need a written quote on file or want to attach a Letter of Intent.

fields.additionalPlaceholder: Letter of Intent details, certifications required, target landed price, etc.
fields.consent: I have read and accept the

errors.whatsappFormat: Use international format starting with +, e.g. +1 555 0100.
errors.emailFormat: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.productsMin: Please select at least one product type.
errors.consentRequired: Please accept the privacy policy to continue.
errors.fileSize: File must be 5 MB or smaller.
errors.fileType: File must be PDF, JPG, or PNG.
errors.submitFailed: We could not submit your inquiry. Please try again or message us on WhatsApp.

form.successBodyTemplate: Thank you. Your reference number is {{ref}}. We will reply within one business day at {{email}}. For an urgent response, message us on WhatsApp.

findUs.leadTemplate: Our factory is at {{addressShort}}. We welcome buyer audits and pre-shipment inspections by appointment.
findUs.directionsAria: Open driving directions in Google Maps (opens in new tab)
findUs.hubsNoteTemplate: Free airport pickup from {{city}} (SRG) and Yogyakarta (YIA) for confirmed buyer visits. Request in advance via WhatsApp.
findUs.photoMainGateTemplate: Main gate of the factory in {{city}}
findUs.photoQualityControl: Quality control bench checking briquette specs
findUs.photoLoadingBay: Loading bay with 20ft container ready for export

hours.heading: Business hours and 2026 holidays
hours.lead: Our factory operates Monday–Saturday, 08:00–16:00 GMT+7 (WIB). We pause production on Indonesian public holidays and during Idul Fitri (Lebaran).
hours.lebaranBodyTemplate: No production or shipment tracking from {{from}} through {{to}}. Place orders before {{cutoff}} to ship before the break.

hotels.heading: Where to stay during your visit
hotels.leadTemplate: We recommend the following hotels for buyer visits to our {{city}} factory, with approximate driving times.

payment.heading: Factory bank details
payment.warningBodyTemplate: Always confirm these bank details by phone or video call with our director ({{director}}) before any transfer. We will never ask you to send funds to a personal account or to an account name that differs from the one shown here. If anything looks different, stop and message us on WhatsApp.
payment.lastVerifiedTemplate: Last verified by phone with the director on {{date}}.
payment.piButton: Request a Proforma Invoice on WhatsApp
payment.piButtonAria: Open WhatsApp to request a Proforma Invoice (opens in new tab)
